Modular inventory management with Spring Boot

A modular inventory management system - products, suppliers, customers, invoices and stock movements in one Spring Boot application.

Java · Spring Boot PostgreSQL Docker GitHub Actions

Architecture

System design, layering, security, and deployment of the Spring Boot service.

API reference

REST API with OAuth2 authentication, endpoints, and schema definitions.
